prestazioni: Engine swap to a 20V turbocharged 3B engine (from the Audi S2) with a forged internals build including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carillo H-beam connecting rods, and a fully balanced crankshaft by VAC Motorsports. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Supersprint with a 200-cell catalytic converter and a straight-pipe section post-cat for optimized flow.

Full standalone engine management conversion using a Bosch Motronic ME7.1.1 ECU reflashed with a custom tune by MTM (Motoren Technik Mayer), incorporating a 3-bar MAP sensor, dual Bosch 0227100207 injectors (440cc), and a custom intercooler setup with a GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler (600x225x76mm) and silicone couplers by Vibrant Performance. Upgrade the fuel system with a Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator.

Chassis reinforcement with a full seam-welded 8J0 401 041 chassis (from the Audi Coupé Quattro) and a custom 6-point roll cage by Custom Cages UK, designed to retain the original rear seat delete. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part no. DFV 1441) with adjustable camber plates, polyurethane bushings by Powerflex (PFF50-410 for front control arms), and a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part no. QDF7J) for the rear differential.
estetica: Full widebody conversion using a modified UR Quattro (UrS4/UrS6) rear quarter panel set, custom-fabricated front fenders with 2-inch flares, and a carbon fiber front splitter by Maxton Design (part no. MX1-AUDI90-01). Rear diffuser by Maxton Design (part no. MX1-AUDI90-03) with integrated dual 3-inch exhaust outlets.

OEM+ restomod interior with Recaro SRD front seats (part no. 387/000) upholstered in black Alcantara with red stitching, a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, part no. 00112010), and a custom gauge pod by Defi (part no. DF13001) housing a 3-gauge setup (boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR). Retain the original dashboard but repaint it in Audi Nogaro Blue (LX5M) with a custom clear-coated woodgrain trim insert.

Lightweight 17x9.5 ET25 BBS RS 002 wheels (part no. 002 27 117 9F) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 255/40/17 rear). Brake system upgrade with AP Racing CP5200 calipers (4-piston front, 2-piston rear) and 330mm slotted rotors by EBC (part no. GD1306) with braided stainless steel brake lines by Goodridge (part no. G-Stop 2000).
